metadata.name: Find User-Generated Content During a Breaking News Event

description: During a breaking news event, a social media editor searches for photos and videos posted by eyewitnesses on social media.

nodes.task_description: Search social media platforms using relevant keywords and location tags for the event.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a stream of posts from the event location.

nodes.task_description: Identify the most compelling and credible-looking photos and videos.

expected_outcome.value: A selection of potential user-generated content is made.

nodes.task_description: Contact the original posters to ask for permission to use their content with credit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent secures the rights to use the content.
